phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is space at the bar
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay sitio libre en la barra ahora?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ah-ee SEE-tee-oh LEE-breh en lah BAH-rrah ah-OH-rah?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is space at the back now.

responses.english: Yes, there is space at the back now.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main terrace seating is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la terraza principal para sentarse?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah teh-RAH-sah prin-see-PAHL PAH-rah sehn-tee-SEER-seh?

likely_response.local: Siga el patio hasta la cristalera grande.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah EHL pah-TEE-oh AH-stah LAH kree-stah-LEH-rah GRAHN-deh
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the patio, on the right.

responses.english: At the back of the patio, on the right.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah EHL pah-TEE-oh AH-stah LAH kree-stah-LEH-rah GRAHN-deh
responses.french: Siga el patio hasta la cristalera grande.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the historic photo collection is displayed
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están las fotos históricas expuestas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lahs FOH-tohs ees-TOH-ree-kahs eks-poo-SEH-dahs?

likely_response.local: En el Patio de los Azulejos, arriba.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL pah-TEE-oh DEH LOHS ah-thoo-LEH-hohs ahr-REE-bah
likely_response.translation_en: On the interior walls, clearly visible.

responses.english: On the interior walls, clearly visible.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL pah-TEE-oh DEH LOHS ah-thoo-LEH-hohs ahr-REE-bah
responses.french: En el Patio de los Azulejos, arriba.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to order tapas from the kitchen
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo se piden las tapas de cocina?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KO-mo se PEE-den las TAH-pas de ko-KEE-nah?

likely_response.local: Dígame en la barra de la planta baja o al camarero.
likely_response.pronunciation: DÍ-gah-meh EHN LAH BAHR-rah DEH LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah OH AHL kah-mah-REH-roh
likely_response.translation_en: Order directly at the bar or to the waiter.

responses.english: Order directly at the bar or to the waiter.
responses.phonetic: DÍ-gah-meh EHN LAH BAHR-rah DEH LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah OH AHL kah-mah-REH-roh
responses.french: Dígame en la barra de la planta baja o al camarero.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Roman Theatre view terrace is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la terraza con vista al Teatro Romano?
phrases.pronunciation: BWAY-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-day eh-STAH lah tehr-RAH-sah kohn VEES-tah al teh-AH-troh roh-MAH-noh?

likely_response.local: Suba las escaleras al fondo del local.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs AHL FOHN-doh DEHL loh-KAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Go up the stairs at the back of the venue.

responses.english: Go up the stairs at the back of the venue.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs AHL FOHN-doh DEHL loh-KAHL
responses.french: Suba las escaleras al fondo del local.
